title: GD656MotionHUD
description: This mod adds a dynamic, moving HUD that reacts to your view, creating a Battlefield-style sense of immersion.
body:
This mod by MinecraftGD656 provides a highly fluid, Battlefield-like HUD resistance effect, making the HUD feel more dynamic and comfortable rather than rigid. When you turn your view, the HUD briefly moves in the opposite direction before smoothly realigning, and it is compatible with any modded HUD you prefer! It performs excellently both in vanilla PVP and on gunfight servers, filling a significant gap in the Minecraft gunplay experience.

# Basic Features  
- When turning your view, the HUD briefly moves in the opposite direction, creating a resistance effect, then smoothly realigns  
- Configurable via an editable config file  

# Key Features  
- HUD animations are not limited to vanilla’s 20 ticks, resulting in exceptionally smooth motion  
- Works on vanilla servers after installing the mod on the client side  
- Lightweight codebase—just over 100 lines—with strong compatibility  

_More features in development..._

这款由MinecraftGD656制作的minecraft模组提供了非常流畅的类似《战地》的HUD阻力效果让HUD变得有灵性，更加舒适不生硬，当你在转动视角时HUD会短暂地往反方向移动，平滑回正，且兼容任何你喜爱的模组HUD！无论是在原版PVP还是枪战服务器中都表现出色，弥补了minecraft枪战体验上的一个很大的空缺。

# 基础功能
- 当你在转动视角时HUD会短暂地往反方向移动，制造一种阻力效果，最后平滑回正
- 使用可自由编辑config文件进行配置

# 功能特色
- HUD动画不仅限于原版的20tick，所以其非常流畅
- 客户端安装此模组后进入一个原版服务端服务器也可以使用
- 代码量非小，仅仅100多行代码，兼容性强
  
_更多功能正在开发......_
